name: /standards-remove: --force allows removal of a plugin-shipped bundled source (operator override)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-remove.sh" --id google-tsguide --force --emit-audit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl" && grep -E "force-removed-bundled" .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
